recap:
- Modern GenAI applications leverage enterprise data for improved performance and insights.
- Supplementing training data with general industry data can enhance GenAI applications.
- The Databricks Marketplace is a resource for finding supplementary datasets.
- Understanding licensing issues is crucial when selecting datasets for GenAI applications.
- Evaluating datasets involves determining their suitability based on licensing and application needs.
- The demo will demonstrate how to navigate the Databricks Marketplace and assess dataset licenses.
